structural_accuracy.3: Correctly identifies all major top-level modules; responsibilities clearly defined; key types/classes accurately described; module boundaries respect design intent
structural_accuracy.2: Identifies most modules; minor omissions; core functional areas present
structural_accuracy.1: Partial coverage; missing 1-2 major modules or unclear responsibilities; vague on key abstractions
structural_accuracy.0: Major components missing; fundamental misunderstanding of project structure

cross_module_tracing.3: Complete end-to-end trace through primary pipeline; intermediate types/classes identified at each stage; data flow clear; integration points noted
cross_module_tracing.2: Key stages present; minor gaps (one intermediate stage unclear, or one type missing); general flow understandable
cross_module_tracing.1: Partial trace; missing multiple stages or intermediate types; flow not end-to-end
cross_module_tracing.0: No meaningful trace or entirely incorrect

approach_quality.3: Change proposal identifies: correct files and classes; follows existing patterns; integration point appropriate; realistic risks identified; minimal disruption to existing code
approach_quality.2: Reasonable proposal; most files and types identified; risks partially addressed
approach_quality.1: Incomplete; missing files, unclear integration point, or no risk analysis

tool_efficiency.3: 5 or fewer research tool calls; focused exploration; clear synthesis path
tool_efficiency.2: 6-10 research tool calls; somewhat exploratory but reaches conclusions
tool_efficiency.1: 11-20 research tool calls; extensive exploration; delayed synthesis
tool_efficiency.0: More than 20 research tool calls; inefficient; redundant or circular exploration

hypotheses.H1_fix_efficacy: v10 B median research_calls <= 5 vs v9 B ~11; quality_score non-inferior to v9 B
hypotheses.H4_open_weight: D and E achieve quality_score >= v9 B baseline on structural_accuracy and cross_module_tracing
hypotheses.H0_null: No significant differences (15 pairwise Mann-Whitney U, Bonferroni alpha=0.0033)

scoring_instructions.blinding: Scorer reads outputs blindly (no condition labels visible). Blinding map reveals condition post-scoring.
scoring_instructions.dimensions: Rate each dimension 0-3 per rubric. Total quality_score = sum of 4 dimensions (0-12).
scoring_instructions.tie_breaking: On borderline scores, refer to rubric anchor descriptions. When uncertain, write notes in 'notes' field for review.
scoring_instructions.pacing: Allow 15-30 minutes per output. Consistency check: review first 3 outputs after scoring all 24 for calibration drift.

analysis_notes.reporting_frame: All analyses are exploratory due to N=4 per condition. Effect sizes and practical significance weighted more than p-values.
analysis_notes.statistical_method: Mann-Whitney U with rank-biserial r effect size; scipy preferred if available, else normal approximation
